Home.subtitleBold: Anyone can copy your name, your photos, your face — and pretend to be you online.
Home.subtitleRest: LiveID is the one link that proves the real you. Click it, and every fake falls apart.
Home.heroFootnote: Malaysians lose hundreds of millions to online scams every year — many of them run by people pretending to be someone real. This is how you prove the real one is you.
Home.sellerHeading: Your customers want proof you're real. Give it to them.
Home.sellerBody: A fake account with your photos can scam your own followers — and your name takes the blame. Your LiveID page is the one place that shows which accounts are truly yours. New customers click once and buy with confidence.
Home.everyoneBody: A verified LiveID protects anyone who's ever been doubted or copied — freelancers, public figures, content creators, or an ordinary person who just wants to prove they're real.
Home.premiumHeading: Grab these before someone else does.
Home.howHeading: Three steps. One link nobody can fake.
Home.step01Desc: Type any name. See if it's still available.
Home.step02Desc: A quick selfie. Takes 10 seconds. No IC needed.
Home.step03Desc: Share liveid.asia/yourname anywhere. One click tells the world the real one is you.
Home.whyStat: Anyone can pretend to be anyone online.
Home.whyBeat2: A fake account. Your photos. A different phone number. By the time you find out, someone has already been scammed in your name — and your money, or your reputation, is gone.
Home.whyBeat3: LiveID ends that. One link. Click it. Know instantly you're dealing with a real human being — not a bot, not a scammer, not a fake version of someone real.
Home.priceLine: From RM17.90 the first year. Renews at RM28/year. Your name is yours forever.
Home.footerLine2: liveid.asia is a product of AWAS Premium Resources. All rights reserved.

Register.getSubtitle: Choose your handle — this is your verified identity on LiveID.
Register.noHandles: No handles found. Try a different name.

Register.consentPost: . I consent to LiveID collecting and storing my selfie photograph for identity verification purposes.

Register.selfieInstruction: Look directly at the camera and tap the button below.

Verify.welcomeBody: Anyone can paste this link anywhere. Landing on this page does not confirm that the person messaging you is the owner of this handle.
Verify.welcomeInstruction: Please complete the checks below before you transact.
Verify.checkFaceBody: This is the verified face of {handle} during registration.
Verify.checkSocialTitle: Are you chatting from one of these accounts?
Verify.checkSocialBody: These are the social accounts registered by {handle}.
Verify.lookalikeWarning: Compare the username letter by letter. Scammers use lookalikes: @name_official, @nam0e, @name.my
Verify.checkWhatsappTitle: Is this the WhatsApp number they gave you?
Verify.checkWhatsappBodyPublic: This is the WhatsApp number registered by this handle.
Verify.checkWhatsappBodyPrivate: This handle keeps their number private. Paste the number you were given and we will tell you whether it belongs to this handle. We never show you their number.
Verify.matchNo: This number does NOT belong to {handle}.
Verify.matchNoBody: Whoever gave you this number is not the owner of this handle. Do not pay or send anything.
Verify.matchInvalid: That does not look like a Malaysian mobile number.
Verify.matchLimited: You have used all your checks for this handle today. Try again in 24 hours.
Verify.matchUnavailable: This handle has no registered WhatsApp number to check against.
Verify.matchRemaining: {count} check(s) left for this handle today.
Verify.verdictPass: You are dealing with the real {handle}.
Verify.verdictFail: Stop. Do not pay or send anything. You may be dealing with someone impersonating {handle}.
Verify.sealDesc: A unique cryptographic seal generated when this handle was issued. It is bound to this person's verified identity and cannot be forged or reused.
Verify.referralSubtitle: Get your own verified handle at liveid.asia
Verify.expiredMid: has not renewed their LiveID verification.
Verify.expiredPost: Do not accept this handle as proof of identity. An expired LiveID does not confirm who this person is.
Verify.notFoundPost: If someone gave you this link as proof of identity, they are not verified.
Verify.limitedIntro: {handle} is a verified real human with a sealed LiveID. But right now there is nothing on this page you can compare against the person messaging you.
Verify.limitedFaceLocked: Face — registered, but visible to LiveID members only
Verify.limitedAction: Ask {handle} to complete their LiveID page before you pay or send anything.
Verify.faceProtectedBody: {handle} has chosen to show their verified photo to LiveID members only. Anyone can see they are verified, but their face is not exposed to the open internet.
Verify.faceLoginButton: Log in to see the verified face
Verify.scopeDoes1: A real human passed a liveness check to open this handle.
Verify.scopeDoes2: The details on this page were registered by that account holder.
Verify.scopeNot1: LiveID does not verify that those details are true, and is not responsible for information entered by the handle owner.
Verify.scopeDecision: Use this page to help you decide. Do not rely on it alone.
Verify.verdictFailedBody: One of the details you were given does not belong to {handle}. Do not pay or send anything. You are likely dealing with someone impersonating this handle.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.s1b: LiveID is a product of AWAS Premium Resources (SSM Registration: 202603141446), a company incorporated in Malaysia. By registering for LiveID, you agree to these Terms & Conditions in full.
Terms.s2b: LiveID is a verified human identity platform. Upon registration, you are issued a unique handle (e.g. liveid.asia/yourname) that serves as your verified online identity. Your handle is linked to a selfie taken at the time of registration.
Terms.s3b: Your handle is licensed to you, not sold. It is non-transferable and non-resalable. Your handle remains active for as long as your subscription is valid. Upon expiry and non-renewal, your handle may be deactivated. Upon account deletion, your handle is permanently retired and cannot be claimed by anyone else.
Terms.s4b: Each individual may only register one LiveID account. Registering multiple accounts is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate termination of all accounts without refund.
Terms.s5b: All payments are processed via ToyyibPay. Registration fees and handle fees are non-refundable once payment is successfully processed. Annual renewal fees are non-refundable after payment.
Terms.s6b: Your LiveID subscription must be renewed annually to remain active. It is your sole responsibility to renew before your expiry date. AWAS Premium Resources will send a reminder email 14 days before expiry but is not liable for any lapse caused by failure to renew.
Terms.s7b: You must not use LiveID to impersonate another person, conduct fraud, provide false identity information, or use the platform for any illegal purpose. Violation of this clause will result in immediate account termination without refund and may be reported to the relevant authorities.
Terms.s8b: AWAS Premium Resources reserves the right to terminate any account at any time without prior notice if we determine that these Terms & Conditions have been violated. No refund will be issued upon termination for violations.
Terms.s9b: AWAS Premium Resources shall not be liable for any loss or damage arising from your use of LiveID, including but not limited to financial loss, reputational damage, or unauthorized access to your account. Use of LiveID is at your own risk.
Terms.s10b: These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of Malaysia. Any disputes arising shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Malaysia.
Terms.s11b: AWAS Premium Resources reserves the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of LiveID after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
Terms.s12b: For any queries regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at hello@awas.asia.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1b: AWAS Premium Resources (SSM Registration: 202603141446) is the data controller responsible for your personal data collected through LiveID (liveid.asia). For any data-related enquiries, contact us at hello@awas.asia.
Privacy.s2b:
We collect the following personal data when you register for LiveID:

• Full name (optional, for display purposes)
• Phone number
• Email address
• Selfie photograph (facial image) — collected at registration as your permanent profile photo
• Social media links — provided voluntarily by you
• Verification page visit logs — IP address, browser user agent, referrer URL, and timestamp of visits to your verification page
Privacy.s3b:
Your personal data is collected solely for the purpose of:

• Verifying that you are a real human being
• Creating and maintaining your unique LiveID handle
• Displaying your verified identity on your public verification page
• Processing your payment
• Sending you renewal reminders and service communications
• Detecting and preventing fraud and duplicate registrations
Privacy.s4b: Under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA) Malaysia and its 2024 Amendment, your selfie photograph constitutes sensitive personal data (biometric data). We collect and process this data based on your explicit consent given at the time of registration. You may withdraw your consent at any time by deleting your account.
Privacy.s5b:
Your data may be processed by the following third-party service providers on our behalf:

• Cloudinary (Cloudinary Ltd) — secure cloud storage for your selfie photograph
• Neon (Neon Inc) — database hosting for your account data
• ToyyibPay — payment processing
• Resend — email delivery service

All third-party processors are contractually obligated to protect your data and may not use it for any purpose other than providing services to LiveID.
Privacy.s6b:
We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active, plus one (1) year after account expiry or deletion. Upon account deletion:

• Your selfie photograph is permanently deleted from Cloudinary
• Your personal data is permanently deleted from our database
• Your handle is retired permanently and cannot be re-registered

Verification page visit logs are retained for a maximum of 12 months.
Privacy.s7b:
Under the PDPA Malaysia, you have the following rights:

• Right to access — you may request a copy of your personal data held by us
• Right to correct — you may correct any inaccurate or incomplete data
• Right to withdraw consent — you may withdraw your consent and delete your account at any time via your dashboard
• Right to data portability — you may request your data in a structured format

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at hello@awas.asia. We will respond within 21 days as required by law.
Privacy.s8b: In the event of a personal data breach that is likely to cause significant harm to you, we will notify the Personal Data Protection Commissioner within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach, as required under the PDPA 2024 Amendment. We will also notify affected users as soon as practicable.
Privacy.s9b: Your selfie photograph is used solely as your LiveID profile photo displayed on your public verification page. It is stored securely on Cloudinary. We do not use your photograph for facial recognition, biometric matching, or any purpose beyond identity display. Your photograph cannot be changed after registration and will be permanently deleted upon account deletion.
Privacy.s9ab:
Your verified selfie is shown only to logged-in LiveID members. Anonymous visitors to your verification page see your handle, verified status, social links and security seal, but not your photograph.

When a logged-in LiveID member views another member's verification page, we record the viewing member's ID, the handle viewed, the time, and the IP address. We use this solely for fraud prevention and abuse investigation. We do not disclose this to the member being viewed.
Privacy.s10b: LiveID uses a first-party cookie (liveid_ref) to track referral codes for up to 30 days. This cookie is used solely to attribute registrations to the correct referral partner. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising trackers.
Privacy.s11b: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email. Continued use of LiveID after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
Privacy.s12b:
For any privacy-related enquiries, data access requests, or to exercise your PDPA rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at:

hello@awas.asia
AWAS Premium Resources (202603141446)
Negeri Sembilan, Malaysia

Dashboard.expiredNote: Anyone clicking your link now sees an Expired notice. Your handle is still yours — renew to restore your verification.
Dashboard.emptyDirect: No direct earnings yet. Share your referral link to start earning.
Dashboard.strengthCompleteBody: Your verification page is complete. Buyers can check your face, your accounts and your number.
Dashboard.strengthIncompleteBody: Being verified is not the same as having a page a buyer can use. Here is what a visitor can check on your page right now.
Dashboard.strengthVerified: Verified human — liveness checked at registration
Dashboard.strengthPhotoNo: No face photo — buyers cannot compare your face
Dashboard.strengthSocialNo: No social accounts — buyers cannot check which accounts are yours
Dashboard.strengthWhatsappNo: No WhatsApp — buyers cannot check a number they were given

Profile.profilePhotoDesc: Your profile photo is your verified selfie taken during registration. It cannot be changed.
Profile.whoCanSee: Who can see your verified photo?
Profile.membersOnlyRest: — anyone can see you are verified, but only logged-in members see your photo.
Profile.everyoneRest: — your photo shows to any visitor. Recommended if people need to recognise you before they transact.
Profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be known
Profile.myShopDesc: Turn this on to show what you sell on your verified page. Buyers see your shop after they confirm you are real.
Profile.turnOnShopRest: — off means your page stays a plain verified profile.
Profile.shopTitlePlaceholder: Used Cars — Seremban / Takaful Agent / Homemade Kuih
Profile.shopAboutPlaceholder: A short line about your business
Profile.saveFirstNote: Save this page first, then add the items you sell.
Profile.deleteWarnPre: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Your handle
Profile.deleteWarnPost: will be retired forever and cannot be claimed by anyone else. All your data will be deleted.
Profile.modalWarnPre: You are about to permanently delete your LiveID account. Your handle
Profile.modalWarnPost: will be retired forever. This cannot be undone.
Profile.photoTip: Sellers: showing your photo to everyone makes your page far harder to fake. A buyer who can see your face knows instantly if the person messaging them is someone else.
Profile.socialLinksDesc: These are shown on your verification page so buyers can confirm which accounts are really yours. Social profiles are already public, so nothing new is exposed.
Profile.waDesc: Optional. Your number is the one detail here that is not already public somewhere else, so you choose how it is used.
Profile.waWhoCanSee: How should your number be used?
Profile.waModeMatchRest: — nobody is ever shown your number. A buyer who was given a number can test it and is told yes or no. Recommended.
Profile.waModePublicRest: — your number is displayed to everyone, including visitors who are not logged in. Easiest for buyers to reach you.
Profile.waModeHiddenRest: — your number is stored but never shown and never checked. Buyers contact you through your other links.
Profile.waNoticePublic: Your number will be visible to anyone who opens your verification page, including people who are not logged in and search engines. Only choose this if you are comfortable with your number being public.
Profile.waNoticeMatch: Your number is never displayed to anyone. Visitors can only confirm whether a number they already have belongs to you. Limited to 2 checks per person per day.
Profile.waNoticeHidden: Your number stays private and no check is offered on your page.
